title: trifolium montanum var. rupestre
intro: Trifolium montanum var. rupestre, also known as Alpine Clover or Mountain Clover, is a perennial legume plant that belongs to the pea family and is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Alpine Clover include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and reduce symptoms of anxiety and stress. Herbal preparations of Trifolium montanum var. rupestre include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other topical applications.
